jsonLd.title: DMart is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
DMart invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DMart:
DMart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DMart!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
